hindi: शिव उवाच — शृणु देवि प्रवक्ष्यामि कुञ्जिकास्तोत्रमुत्तमम्।
english: Shiva says: Listen O Goddess, I shall declare the excellent Kunjika Stotram
roman: Shiva Uvacha — Shrunu Devi pravakshyami Kunjika Stotram uttamam

english: By the power of which mantra the chanting of the Chandi becomes auspicious
roman: Yena mantra prabhavena Chandi japah shubho bhavet

hindi: न कवचं नार्गलास्तोत्रं कीलकं न रहस्यकम्।
english: No Kavacham, no Argala Stotram, no Kilakam, no secret text
roman: Na kavacham na Argala Stotram Kilakam na rahasyakam

hindi: न सूक्तं नापि ध्यानं च न न्यासो न च वार्चनम्॥
english: No Suktam, no meditation, no Nyasa, no worship is needed separately
roman: Na suktam napi dhyanam cha na nyaso na cha varchanam

english: By the mere reading of the Kunjika one obtains the fruit of reading the Durga Saptashati
roman: Kunjika patha matrena Durga patha phalam labhet

english: This is most secret O Goddess, difficult to obtain even for gods
roman: Ati guhyataram Devi devanam api durlabham

hindi: ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे — ओम् ग्लौं हुं क्लीं जूं सः।
english: Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chamundayai Vichche — Om Glaum Hum Kleem Jum Sah
roman: Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chamundayai Vichche, Om Glaum Hum Kleem Jum Sah

english: Flaming, pure, honoured, beautiful, slayer of Shumbha
roman: Jvalini nirmala manya shobhana shumbha ghatini
